name: RottenPotato Like Attack Pattern
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @SBousseaden, Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: RottenPotato Like Attack Pattern
SIGMA Description: Detects logon events that have characteristics of events generated during an attack with RottenPotato and the like

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=3 AND "Target Username"='ANONYMOUS LOGON' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%127.0.0.1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%::1%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY RottenPotato Like Attack Pattern on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=3 AND "Target Username"='ANONYMOUS LOGON' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%127.0.0.1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%::1%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: RottenPotato Like Attack Pattern
